title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3.3, Phi-4, Gemma 2, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama: chat, generate, embed, pull, list, delete models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; works in Node, Deno, Bun and modern browsers.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration enabling Ollama models as LLM, chat, embed, and tool-calling components.

title: ollama-webui (formerly Ollama-WebUI)
summary: Feature-rich chat WebUI for Ollama: markdown, code highlight, RAG, multi-user, dark mode, PWA.

title: ollama4j – Java Ollama Client
summary: Unofficial Java/Kotlin client providing sync/async APIs, streaming, embeddings, and tool calls.

title: ollama-rag – CLI RAG tool
summary: Lightweight Python CLI to build Retrieval-Augmented Generation pipelines over local documents.

title: ollama-copilot – GitHub Copilot-like plugin
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a free local Copilot with inline completion.

title: ollama-discord – Discord bot
summary: Self-host a Discord bot backed by Ollama models; supports slash commands, threads, and file uploads.

title: ollama-cli – Rust CLI wrapper
summary: Fast, colorful Rust CLI for chatting, pulling, and managing Ollama models from the terminal.

title: ollama-ex – Elixir client
summary: Minimal Elixir library with GenServer-backed connection pooling and streaming for Phoenix apps.

title: ollama-nim – Nim wrapper
summary: Nimble package offering synchronous and asynchronous APIs to Ollama with native JSON handling.

title: ollama-helm – Kubernetes Helm charts
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama server and models on Kubernetes clusters.

title: ollama-dagger – Dagger CI module
summary: Reusable Dagger module to spin up Ollama service inside CI pipelines for integration testing.

title: ollama-csharp – .NET SDK
summary: Community-maintained C# SDK targeting .NET 6+ with async enumerators and System.Text.Json.

title: ollama-rust – Rust crate
summary: Async Rust client using reqwest and tokio; exposes chat, generate, pull, embed, and delete endpoints.

title: ollama-zig – Zig client library
summary: Zig package that provides a simple http client for Ollama with arena allocators and JSON parsing.

title: ollama-rf – Robot Framework library
summary: Robot Framework keyword library for testing applications that integrate with Ollama models.
